name: GORUFOO
short_description: A Fantasy Sport Arcade - A Golf-like sport for the new generation - Simple easy-to-learn gameplay - The game transforms into a bullet-hell like arena as the player proceeds into the higher stages
detailed_description:
Welcome to the Fantasy Sport GORUFOO!

Dodge traps, sink the ball, collect XP to lower your score in this wacky world of fantasy sport GORUFOO.

Early Access Release version includes:
- Main game mode "Score Attack" (Balancing and rulesets may change as updates come)
- Online leaderboard

"Score Attack" mode
- The main objective of the game is to sink the ball. Score as many holes as you can in the provided time span. Simple as it gets!
- As you score, the arena provides the player with the opportunity to up the stakes and prolong the game time
- Additional rules and hazards are planned to be implemented as development goes
